infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: QuickGift needs your location to show nearby gift shops and beauty service providers.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: QuickGift needs camera access to take profile photos and upload product images.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: QuickGift needs photo library access to upload profile photos and product images.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: QuickGift needs your location to show nearby gift shops and beauty providers.

plugins.photosPermission: QuickGift needs access to your photos to upload profile pictures and product images.
plugins.cameraPermission: QuickGift needs camera access to take profile photos.
